operating_ranges.evidence: Most spindle designs include an outer cap whose male register surface should lightly compress the bearing's outer ring. Suggested axial compression: 10-30μm.
Target outer ring to housing fit: 2μm loose to 2μm tight
General Target: 3 to 5 microns (depends upon application)

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Excessive and/or uneven clamping pressure can result in bearing noise or loss of preload
Protection against contamination from cutting operations (cutting fluid and chips)
Rear-side bearings and shaft must float within housing bore to allow axial thermal expansion

fault_conditions.name: excessive_bearing_preload
fault_conditions.description: Excessive bearing-shaft interference or insufficient bearing-housing clearance fit may lead to excessive bearing preload and seizure
fault_conditions.symptoms: bearing noise or loss of preload
fault_conditions.evidence: Excessive bearing-shaft interference or insufficient bearing-housing clearance fit may lead to excessive bearing preload and seizure

fault_conditions.name: thermal_expansion_restriction
fault_conditions.description: Insufficient bearing-housing clearance at the rear-side may prevent the rear-side bearings and shaft from floating within housing bore during axial thermal expansion
fault_conditions.evidence: Insufficient bearing-housing clearance at the rear-side may prevent the rear-side bearings and shaft from floating within housing bore during axial thermal expansion

fault_conditions.name: contamination_ingress
fault_conditions.description: Entry of foreign matter such as metallic particles and grit
fault_conditions.symptoms: Indentations on raceway and rolling elements
fault_conditions.evidence: Entry of foreign matter such as metallic particles and grit

maintenance_actions.name: housing_runout_inspection
maintenance_actions.evidence: Housing Measurements Target Values: General Target: 3 to 5 microns (depends upon application)

maintenance_actions.name: housing_bore_measurement
maintenance_actions.evidence: Measure the shaft OD and housing bore at the bearing locations. Calculate the bearing shaft and housing fits and compare with OEM specifications or NSK guidelines

maintenance_actions.name: sealing_system_inspection
maintenance_actions.evidence: Labyrinth-type sealing with narrow grooves tightly adjusted to housing walls. Air sealing systems with constant controlled pressured air feed

assumptions.statement: Housing provides stable thermal environment for bearing operation
assumptions.reason: Manual discusses thermal expansion accommodation but does not specify housing thermal properties

assumptions.statement: Housing geometry tolerances follow ISO 1101 standard
assumptions.reason: Manual references ISO 1101 standard for geometry and dimensional tolerances including runout, angularity, circularity, concentricity
